imaging_summary: Pelvic MRI: 2.5 cm cervical tumor confined to the cervix; no parametrial involvement; no enlarged lymph nodes.
pathology_summary: Cervical biopsy: invasive squamous cell carcinoma. Tumor size 2.5 cm on exam and imaging.
proposed_plan: Radical hysterectomy with pelvic lymph node assessment.
patient_preferences: Wants standard curative treatment; would like to understand fertility implications.
